bioses.name: 7931.bin
bioses.notes: First release. GCE-branded ROM (predates MB acquisition); title screen reads 'GCE - ENTERTAINING NEW IDEAS'. Units with this ROM produce a buzz unless manually de-buzzed.

bioses.name: B796.bin
bioses.notes: Second release. Milton Bradley ROM; title screen reads 'VECTREX'. Units with this ROM produce a buzz unless manually de-buzzed.

bioses.name: 7ADB.bin
bioses.notes: European release. Milton Bradley ROM; title screen reads 'VECTREX'. Includes a fixed version of the built-in Mine Storm game and has no buzz. Uses a different PCB; serial number series 311xxxx.

bioses.name: BIOS.BIN
bioses.notes: 4KB BIOS-only portion of the Vectrex ROM (without the built-in Mine Storm game). Used by some emulators that load Mine Storm separately.
